@if (vendor) {
Vendors chevron_right {{ vendor.vendorCode }}

{{ vendor.vendorName }}

{{ vendor.status.toUpperCase() }} {{ vendor.category.toUpperCase() }}
payments
{{ vendor.contractValue | currency: 'INR' : 'symbol-narrow' : '1.0-0' }} Contract Value
star_rate
{{ vendor.rating.toFixed(1) }} Rating
today
{{ vendor.joinedDate | date: 'MMM yyyy' }} Member Since

person Contacts ({{ vendor.contacts.length }})

@for (contact of vendor.contacts; track contact.id) {
{{ contactInitials(contact.name) }}
{{ contact.name }} @if (contact.isPrimary) { Primary } {{ contact.role }}
✉ {{ contact.email }}
@if (contact.phone) {
☎ {{ contact.phone }}
}
}

location_on Location

Address {{ vendor.address || '—' }}
City {{ vendor.city }}
Country {{ vendor.country }}

business_center Business

Website {{ vendor.website }}
Tax ID {{ vendor.taxId || '—' }}
Last Activity {{ vendor.lastActivity | date: 'mediumDate' }}
Joined {{ vendor.joinedDate | date: 'mediumDate' }}
@if (vendor.notes) {

notes Notes

{{ vendor.notes }}

}
schedule Created {{ formatDate(vendor.joinedDate) }} update Updated {{ formatDate(vendor.lastActivity) }} ID: {{ vendor.id }}
arrow_back Back to Vendors
}
